items.question: What's the minimum age for kids' clubs?
items.answer: It varies by resort — commonly starting around age 2–4. We confirm the exact age range against your children's ages before shortlisting a resort.

items.question: Can we get a family villa with two bedrooms?
items.answer: Some resorts offer two-bedroom family villas or connecting rooms; others only offer extra beds in a standard villa. We'll flag which type of room each option actually is.

items.question: Is baby food or formula available on-island?
items.answer: Availability is inconsistent across resorts — we recommend bringing your own supply and will confirm what the kitchen can accommodate ahead of your stay.

items.question: Should we do the Resort + Local Island Combo with kids?
items.answer: Yes, plenty of families do — the guesthouse portion tends to be lower-key and social, then the resort half adds the kids' club and pool. See our Combo page for how it's structured.
